# ATProto-specific CBOR structures
# Record with $type
A2 65 24 74 79 70 65 6B 61 70 70 2E 62 73 6B 79 2E 66 65 65 64 2E 70 6F 73 74

# Blob reference
A3 64 72 65 66 6A 24 6C 69 6E 6B 6B 62 61 66 79 72 65 69 66 66 34 68 76 63 6D 6A 77 72 72 68 67 37 34 37 37 75 6D 77 6B 6C 37 70 32 62 77 62 70 70 71 78 66 74 6A 77 36 73 6B 35 36 6D 70 32 6C 72 6B 36 63 73 65 67 6D 69 6D 65 54 79 70 65 66 69 6D 61 67 65 2F 6A 70 65 67 64 73 69 7A 65 18 80 1A 00 00 D4 31

# Nested complex structures
A4 6B 63 72 65 61 74 65 64 41 74 6B 63 72 65 61 74 65 64 41 74 6B 6C 61 62 65 6C 73 A1 64 72 65 66 6A 24 6C 69 6E 6B 6B 62 61 66 79 72 65 69 66 66 34 68 76 63 6D 6A 77 72 72 68 67 37 34 37 37 75 6D 77 6B 6C 37 70 32 62 77 62 70 70 71 78 66 74 6A 77 36 73 6B 35 36 6D 70 32 6C 72 6B 36 63 73 65 67 6D 69 6D 65 54 79 70 65 66 69 6D 61 67 65 2F 6A 70 65 67 64 73 69 7A 65 18 80 1A 00 00 D4 31
